files..gitattributes: Normalizes shell scripts to LF for Linux reproduction after Windows checkout.
files..gitignore: Omits raw data, four CSVs >100 MB, __pycache__, egg-info, generated PNG/PDF under assets/.
files.FILE_INDEX.md: Human-readable catalog: one distinct comment per tracked path.
files.README.md: Project overview, install steps, Table 6 / RQ2 / RQ3 reproduction, link to FILE_INDEX.
files.REPO_MANIFEST.json: Machine-readable catalog (this file): path → unique description for reviewers and scripts.
files.assets/.gitkeep: Reserves assets/ for benchmark-generated figures (PNG not committed).
files.assets/README.md: Lists which script produces figure7/9/10 and expected output filenames.
files.benchmarks/README.md: Speed, ablation JSON, sensitivity raw runs, and figure generators.
files.benchmarks/ablation_model_components.jso: RQ3 bar-chart source: Hyp / PH-Scan / ACG removal on Logic+M5.
files.benchmarks/ablation_operator.json: Euclidean vs hyperbolic scan operator comparison summary.
files.benchmarks/figure10_parameter_sensitivit: Aggregated Logic c_base & capacity sensitivity curves.
files.benchmarks/figure_architecture_english.p: English NL-H-H-SSM block diagram for manuscript.
files.benchmarks/generate_table.py: Legacy six-dataset LaTeX table from older results layout.
files.benchmarks/plot_curvature_heatmap.py: Schematic curvature/regime heatmap for paper illustration.
files.benchmarks/plot_poincare_vs_euclidean.py: Schematic Poincaré vs Euclidean embedding figure.
files.benchmarks/plot_radar.py: Radar plot comparing models across normalized metrics.
files.benchmarks/sensitivity_results/logic_cba: Logic sweep: nlh_c_base=0.1 — low curvature, ACD plateau check.
Logic sweep: nlh_c_base=1.0 — nominal curvature setting.
Logic sweep: nlh_c_base=2.0 — high curvature upper sweep.
files.benchmarks/sensitivity_results/logic_exp: Logic sweep: nlh_expand=1 — minimal inner width.
Logic sweep: nlh_expand=2 — paper default width.
files.benchmarks/sensitivity_results/logic_mam: Logic baseline: Mamba-2 d_state=128 — widest state.
Logic baseline: Mamba-2 with d_state=16 for capacity match.
files.benchmarks/speed_results/speed_bench.jso: Committed forward-only tokens/s & VRAM — paper Fig.7 / §6.2.
files.benchmarks/speed_results/speed_bench_syn: Short synthetic-length smoke timings for speed_test.py.
files.benchmarks/speed_results/speed_bench_tra: Committed fwd+bwd training throughput — paper Table 7.
files.benchmarks/speed_test.py: A800 protocol: NL-H vs Mamba-2 vs Transformer @ L=1k…128k, d=768.
files.configs/README.md: Explains nlh_tuned.yaml fields used in fair Table 6 comparison.
files.configs/nlh_tuned.example.yaml: Empty schema sample for tune_nlh_ssm.py output.
files.configs/nlh_tuned.yaml: Paper windows & NL-H LR/clip/c_base/layers per stem (tourism…medical).
files.csrc/README.md: Documents PH-Scan kernel and Cauchy helper modules.
files.csrc/cauchy.py: Cauchy/resolvent helpers stabilizing hyperbolic scan accumulation.
files.csrc/ph_scan_kernel.py: Manifold prefix scan O(L/M+log M); Triton path or PyTorch fallback (§4 PH-Scan).
files.data/README.md: Download → preprocess pipeline; which CSVs are committed vs rebuilt.
files.data/download_all.sh: curl/wget ABS + Zenodo archives; documents manual Kaggle M5 step.
files.data/preprocess.py: Raw zips/xlsx/LogicGraph → unified id/time/value CSVs for loader.
files.data/processed/labor.csv: ABS labour account table-1; 3-layer; sMAPE column Lab.
files.data/processed/logic.csv: LogicGraph-derived expert traces; deep hierarchy; ACD column Logic.
files.data/processed/medical.csv: Med-Diag-Path synthetic diagnostic hierarchies; ACD column Med.
files.data/processed/prison.csv: ABS corrective services Jun-2023; 3-layer; sMAPE column Pris.
files.data/processed/tourism.csv: ABS tourism satellite account series; 4-layer hierarchy; sMAPE column Tour.
files.data/processed/wiki.csv: Monash Kaggle web traffic HTS; 5-layer; RMSSE column Wiki.
files.experiments/.gitkeep: Historical placeholder before configs were added.
files.experiments/README.md: Training CLIs, device launcher, and per-dataset YAML examples.
files.experiments/configs/electricity.yaml: Single-run example: Electricity-L hourly HTS CSV.
files.experiments/configs/labor.yaml: Single-run example: Labour-AU CSV path and training length.
files.experiments/configs/logic.yaml: Single-run example: LogicGraph ACD evaluation CSV.
files.experiments/configs/m5.yaml: Single-run example: M5-Walmart (large CSV rebuilt locally).
files.experiments/configs/medical.yaml: Single-run example: Med-Diag-Path ACD evaluation CSV.
files.experiments/configs/prison.yaml: Single-run example: Prison-AU CSV path and training length.
files.experiments/configs/tourism.yaml: Single-run example: Tourism-AU CSV, default epochs, optional cuda device.
files.experiments/configs/wiki.yaml: Single-run example: Wiki-Traffic Monash HTS CSV.
files.experiments/launch_device.py: Resolves device: cpu | cuda:N | multi-GPU DDP list from YAML.
files.experiments/run_exp.py: Main trainer CLI: 5 models × 1 CSV → results/{stem}_{model}.json + metric history.
files.experiments/run_main.py: Loads experiments/configs/*.yaml and delegates to run_exp.
files.models/README.md: Facade layer between run_exp.py and nlh_ssm internals.
files.models/__init__.py: Registers nlh_ssm, ph_scan, acg_gate model names for CLI.
files.models/acg_gate.py: Adaptive Curvature Gate: depth-dependent c_eff from hierarchy metadata.
files.models/nlh_ssm.py: run_exp-facing wrapper: nlh_num_layers, nlh_expand, nlh_c_base from yaml.
files.models/ph_scan.py: Thin PH-Scan module for tests and operator ablations.
files.nlh_ssm/README.md: Index of hyperbolic ops, NL-H modules, loaders, and metric subpackages.
files.nlh_ssm/__init__.py: Top-level import namespace for the NL-H-H-SSM Python package.
files.nlh_ssm/data/__init__.py: Exports get_dataloader for experiments and benchmarks.
files.nlh_ssm/data/loader.py: Long-format CSV windows; infers hierarchy from id delimiter for ACD evaluation.
files.nlh_ssm/metrics/__init__.py: Exports forecast and structure metric functions.
files.nlh_ssm/metrics/distance.py: ACD and MAT for LogicGraph and Med-Diag-Path expert-system columns.
files.nlh_ssm/models/mixer_seq_simple.py: End-to-end sequence model (input proj → NL-H stack → head); Table 6 & speed_test entry.
files.nlh_ssm/models/selective_state_update.py: Selective SSM gate compatible with Mamba-style interfaces inside NL-H.
files.nlh_ssm/modules/hierarchy_embedding.py: Maps slash-separated series IDs to depth features feeding ACG curvature.
files.nlh_ssm/modules/nlh_block.py: Single NL-H layer: hyperbolic state, PH-Scan, ACG; ablation switches wo_hyp/wo_acg/wo_ph_scan.
files.nlh_ssm/ops/check_nan.py: Guards hyperbolic forward/backward against NaN/Inf during long Table 6 runs.
files.nlh_ssm/ops/hyperbolic.py: Poincaré exp₀/log₀, Möbius addition, distance, projection — Eqs. (3)–(5) in paper.
files.nlh_ssm/utils/__init__.py: Shared utility exports for metrics submodule.
files.nlh_ssm/utils/metrics.py: Numerically stable kernels reused by accuracy.py and distance.py.
files.results/README.md: All 50 Table 6 JSON logs with final sMAPE/RMSSE/ACD per file.
files.results/electricity_informer.json: Electricity-L Informer — RMSSE **0.74**, **best** Elec. column. Metrics: smape=30.1664, rmsse=0.7442, acd=22.7080.
files.results/electricity_mamba1.json: Electricity-L Mamba-1 — RMSSE 1.70, third place. Metrics: smape=56.3981, rmsse=1.6950, acd=21.0907.
files.results/electricity_mamba2.json: Electricity-L Mamba-2 — RMSSE 1.42, underline second. Metrics: smape=52.3709, rmsse=1.4185, acd=21.8865.
files.results/electricity_nlh_ssm.json: Electricity-L NL-H-H-SSM — RMSSE 2.33; flat ACD 0.368. Metrics: smape=199.8618, rmsse=2.3278, acd=0.3679.
files.results/electricity_transformer.json: Electricity-L Transformer — RMSSE 2.39, mid industrial baseline. Metrics: smape=198.9267, rmsse=2.3891, acd=0.3679.
files.results/labor_informer.json: Labour-AU Informer — sMAPE 176.35, weakest sMAPE among five models. Metrics: smape=176.3545, rmsse=14.9155, acd=0.5615.
files.results/labor_mamba1.json: Labour-AU Mamba-1 — sMAPE 139.83, underline second on Lab. column. Metrics: smape=139.8272, rmsse=17.5164, acd=0.3386.
files.results/labor_mamba2.json: Labour-AU Mamba-2 — sMAPE 53.60, **best** Lab. sMAPE by large margin. Metrics: smape=53.6036, rmsse=5.1114, acd=13.3978.
files.results/labor_nlh_ssm.json: Labour-AU NL-H-H-SSM — sMAPE 195.03; prioritizes ACD 0.368 over sMAPE here. Metrics: smape=195.0333, rmsse=15.5070, acd=0.3679.
files.results/labor_transformer.json: Labour-AU Transformer — sMAPE 141.10, competitive but not best. Metrics: smape=141.0965, rmsse=17.0130, acd=0.3679.
files.results/logic_informer.json: LogicGraph Informer — ACD 0.511, weaker structure fidelity. Metrics: smape=176.3466, rmsse=0.9785, acd=0.5110.
files.results/logic_mamba1.json: LogicGraph Mamba-1 — ACD **0.326**, **best** Logic. structure column. Metrics: smape=113.5451, rmsse=1.2823, acd=0.3264.
files.results/logic_mamba2.json: LogicGraph Mamba-2 — ACD 8.23, collapsed hierarchy embedding. Metrics: smape=125.2674, rmsse=0.9285, acd=8.2271.
files.results/logic_nlh_ssm.json: LogicGraph NL-H-H-SSM — ACD 0.368 tied best; saturates ablation sweeps. Metrics: smape=199.5630, rmsse=0.9535, acd=0.3679.
files.results/logic_transformer.json: LogicGraph Transformer — ACD 0.368 tied best; sMAPE 175.2. Metrics: smape=175.2077, rmsse=0.9556, acd=0.3679.
files.results/m5_informer.json: M5-Walmart Informer — RMSSE 7.05, weakest RMSSE on M5. Metrics: smape=116.1499, rmsse=7.0540, acd=6.7544.
files.results/m5_mamba1.json: M5-Walmart Mamba-1 — RMSSE 87.56, unstable scale on this hierarchy. Metrics: smape=165.3939, rmsse=87.5648, acd=0.7416.
files.results/m5_mamba2.json: M5-Walmart Mamba-2 — RMSSE 28.93, mid-tier among baselines. Metrics: smape=167.2794, rmsse=28.9346, acd=0.8203.
files.results/m5_nlh_ssm.json: M5-Walmart NL-H-H-SSM — RMSSE **4.30**, **best** M5 column in Table 6. Metrics: smape=199.6964, rmsse=4.2985, acd=0.3679.
files.results/m5_transformer.json: M5-Walmart Transformer — RMSSE 5.40, underline **second**; strong industrial baseline. Metrics: smape=199.6933, rmsse=5.3983, acd=0.3679.
files.results/medical_informer.json: Med-Diag-Path Informer — ACD 0.470, third on structure. Metrics: smape=145.3700, rmsse=1.6959, acd=0.4700.
files.results/medical_mamba1.json: Med-Diag-Path Mamba-1 — ACD **0.366**, **best** Med. ACD (underline). Metrics: smape=185.8735, rmsse=1.7448, acd=0.3664.
files.results/medical_mamba2.json: Med-Diag-Path Mamba-2 — ACD 9.58, poor cophenetic fit. Metrics: smape=55.7301, rmsse=1.0081, acd=9.5771.
files.results/medical_nlh_ssm.json: Med-Diag-Path NL-H-H-SSM — ACD 0.368 tied best; RMSSE 48.3 outlier. Metrics: smape=195.6526, rmsse=48.3269, acd=0.3679.
files.results/medical_transformer.json: Med-Diag-Path Transformer — ACD 0.368 tied best; sMAPE 131.0. Metrics: smape=130.9711, rmsse=2.1845, acd=0.3679.
files.results/prison_informer.json: Prison-AU Informer — sMAPE 155.80, underline second on Pris. Metrics: smape=155.8031, rmsse=0.9015, acd=0.1970.
files.results/prison_mamba1.json: Prison-AU Mamba-1 — sMAPE 172.61, worst sMAPE among five. Metrics: smape=172.6116, rmsse=0.9230, acd=0.3499.
files.results/prison_mamba2.json: Prison-AU Mamba-2 — sMAPE 113.23, **best** Pris. sMAPE. Metrics: smape=113.2322, rmsse=0.7579, acd=1.7049.
files.results/prison_nlh_ssm.json: Prison-AU NL-H-H-SSM — sMAPE 193.87; ACD 0.368 tied best expert metric. Metrics: smape=193.8717, rmsse=0.8657, acd=0.3679.
files.results/prison_transformer.json: Prison-AU Transformer — sMAPE 165.17, mid-pack on Pris. Metrics: smape=165.1663, rmsse=0.9516, acd=0.3679.

files.results/solar_mamba2.json: Solar-HTS Mamba-2 — RMSSE 0.76, underline second. Metrics: smape=12.1347, rmsse=0.7635, acd=10.2530.

files.scripts/README.md: Table 6 campaign, LaTeX export, tuning, RQ3 orchestration scripts.
files.scripts/commit_doc_layers.sh: Optional helper: batch-commit docs/descriptions/ by top-level folder with distinct messages.
files.scripts/generate_table_6.py: JSON → elsarticle Table 6 LaTeX (harv format, no Impv. column).
files.scripts/rank_table6.py: Prints per-dataset ranks and mean rank — quick audit of results/.
files.scripts/run_parameter_sensitivity.sh: Logic sweeps: nlh_c_base, nlh_expand, mamba2 d_state.
files.scripts/run_rq3_ablation.sh: Logic+M5 runs with wo_hyp, wo_acg, wo_ph_scan flags.
files.scripts/run_table6_all.sh: Default: 10 datasets × 5 models @ 40 epochs; subcommands rank/tex/nlh_only.
files.scripts/run_table6_fair_baselines.sh: Baselines only, same seq_len/stride as nlh_tuned.yaml, lr=0.001.
files.scripts/table6_nlh_campaign.sh: Optional tune phases A/B then train for NL-H per dataset.
files.scripts/tune_nlh_ssm.py: Validation-grid search; writes overrides into nlh_tuned.yaml.
files.scripts/upload_from_manifest.py: Commits one file per REPO_MANIFEST entry; each commit message = that file's unique description.
files.scripts/validate_table3_stats.py: Asserts layer count & branching vs paper Table 3 expected rows.
files.setup.py: Setuptools package `nlh-ssm`; core deps torch/pyyaml/pandas/numpy<2; optional [mamba] for baselines.
files.tests/README.md: pytest entry points for hyperbolic, PH-Scan, and metrics.
files.tests/test_hyperbolic.py: Round-trip exp/log and Möbius identity checks on Poincaré ball.
files.tests/test_metrics.py: Hand-checked sMAPE, RMSSE, ACD against reference values.
files.tests/test_ph_scan.py: PH-Scan output shape, dtype, and finite-value smoke test.
files.docs/README.md: Explains docs/descriptions/ stubs and GitHub last-commit-message vs per-file notes.
